title: BD4 8SL, Cliniwaste Health South Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/HP3632MR/V005
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:   Operator name: Cliniwaste Health South Limited Installation name: Bow Beck Clinical Waste Treatment Facility Permit number: EPR/HP3632MR/V005   "
